name: ValveResourceFormat
description: MCP server for interacting with Valve Source 2 resource formats

tools.name: inspect_file
tools.description: Inspect a Source 2 resource file and return detailed information about its structure, blocks, and data.

file_path.description: Path to the resource file to inspect

tools.name: list_vpk_contents
tools.description: List all files in a VPK (Valve Package) archive, with optional filtering by extension or path.

extension_filter.description: Comma-separated list of extensions to filter (e.g., 'vmdl,vmat')

tools.name: decompile_resource
tools.description: Decompile a Source 2 resource file to its raw, human-readable format.

input_path.description: Path to the resource file to decompile

output_path.description: Optional output path for the decompiled file

tools.name: export_gltf
tools.description: Export a 3D model (.vmdl) to glTF/glb format for viewing in other tools.

output_path.description: Path for the output glTF/glb file

include_animations.description: Whether to include animations in the export

include_materials.description: Whether to include materials in the export

tools.name: extract_texture
tools.description: Extract a texture (.vtex) to an image file (PNG/TGA).

output_path.description: Path for the output image file

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Get basic information about a file (size, type, extension).

tools.name: list_directory_resources
tools.description: List all Source 2 resource files in a directory, with optional filtering.

directory.description: Path to the directory to scan

extension_filter.description: Comma-separated list of extensions to include
